items.title:
Is it a red flag…🚩leaving an interview early for another one 😳 or admitting you don’t know something?

These moments can either hurt you—or actually HELP you stand out. Here’s what hiring managers really think. Watch before your next interview.
#JobInterview #CareerAdvice #HiringTips #JobSearch #InterviewTips
